title: Quince, Will - Minister of State for Health and Secondary Care , the Department for Health and Social Care - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Quince left his role as Minister of State for Health and Secondary Care in November 2023  Solicitor, Thompson, Smith and Puxon Will Quince sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Thompson, Smith and Puxon. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in October 2024 and the role was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
